CustomField.description: Numeric engagement score from 0 to 100. Higher values indicate stronger engagement signals (email opens, call completions, meeting attendance, form submissions). Updated by the scoring engine in the service layer. Displayed as a badge on lead cards in stages configured for score display.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Engagement score 0–100. Updated automatically based on interaction signals. Higher is more engaged.
CustomField.label: Engagement Score
